title: Introduction to Algorithms
author: Thomas H. Cormen, Charles E. Leiserson, Ronald L. Rivest, Clifford Stein
description: A comprehensive textbook covering algorithms, data structures, and computational problem-solving.

title: The Pragmatic Programmer
author: Andrew Hunt and David Thomas
description: A foundational book on software craftsmanship, problem-solving, and building resilient systems.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: An accessible exploration of cosmology, black holes, time, and the origins of the universe.

title: The Kite Runner
author: Khaled Hosseini
description: A deeply moving story of friendship, betrayal, guilt, and redemption across Afghanistan and the United States.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A practical guide to writing readable, maintainable, and professional-quality software.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
author: Harper Lee
description: A powerful coming-of-age story set in the American South, centered on justice, empathy, and moral courage.

title: Design Patterns
author: Erich Gamma, Richard Helm, Ralph Johnson, John Vlissides
description: A classic reference for reusable object-oriented design solutions and architecture patterns.

title: The Selfish Gene
author: Richard Dawkins
description: A landmark book explaining evolution from the perspective of genes and natural selection.

title: Pride and Prejudice
author: Jane Austen
description: A classic novel about love, class, misunderstanding, and the social expectations of Regency-era England.

title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A journey of self-discovery about a shepherd who follows his dream and learns to listen to his heart.

title: The Gene
author: Siddhartha Mukherjee
description: A sweeping history of genetics, from inheritance and DNA to modern medicine and identity.

title: Cosmos
author: Carl Sagan
description: A celebrated journey through the universe, science, astronomy, and humanity's place in nature.
